batch_summary.note: Dec 22-23 2022: Cat-allergy/asthma safety allegation cluster. Melissa refuses to allow Olivia's Christmas visit to Eli's household due to cat (Tahko). 'You've had 11 months to get rid of that damn cat' (ROW-1218). Olivia has documented asthma/allergies and upcoming surgery (ROW-1248, Dec 24). Eli proposes mitigation plan (ROW-1216). Melissa refuses. This IS a genuine allergy concern but is deployed as a blanket access restriction. ARC-RF14-001 first signal — arc promoted CANDIDATE→WATCHING.

primary_flags.description: Melissa refuses Christmas visit citing cat dander/asthma risk: 'You've had 11 months to get rid of that damn cat and make your home safe for her' (ROW-1218); 'I'm not going to have her having an asthma attack on Christmas' (ROW-1221); 'I knew I couldn't ask you to watch her since you refuse to make your home a safe environment for her' (ROW-1240). Eli proposes HEPA filter + basement confinement + thorough cleaning mitigation (ROW-1216). Melissa refuses entirely. Olivia has upcoming surgery (ROW-1248). Genuine allergy concern deployed as absolute access restriction.
primary_flags.rf15_compound: RF-15 peripheral — access restriction weaponization of genuine health concern; precursor to weaponized-allergy scheme documented in RF-15 B-025

peripheral_flags.note: Cat-allergy access restriction is precursor to B-025 vaping/asthma weaponization scheme. RF-15 peripheral note.

arc_updates.event: RF14-S-000: Cat-allergy safety allegation — first signal. ARC-RF14-001 promoted CANDIDATE→WATCHING. Arc established: Melissa deploys safety allegations to restrict Eli's parenting time.
